investments.early_withdrawal: Rate reduction penalty. 31 days notice required.

investments.risk_note: Capital stable. PIE tax structure caps tax at 28% PIR regardless of marginal rate. At-call — no notice period.
investments.tax_treatment: Taxed at your PIR rate, capped at 28%. If your marginal rate is 33%, this fund beats a term deposit with a higher headline rate. Example: $50,000 at 3.70% TD at 33% marginal = $1,240 after tax. Same at 3.50% PIE at 28% PIR = $1,260 after tax — PIE wins despite lower headline rate.
investments.early_withdrawal: At call. No penalty, no notice required.
investments.highlight: Best for 33% taxpayers or anyone needing full liquidity

investments.risk_note: PIE structure. Capital stable. At-call liquidity. Tax advantage for higher earners.
investments.tax_treatment: Taxed at PIR rate, capped at 28%. Advantage over term deposits for anyone on 33% marginal rate.

investments.risk_note: Government-owned bank. PIE structure. 32-day notice required for withdrawals — cannot access funds sooner.
investments.tax_treatment: Taxed at PIR rate, capped at 28%. Higher effective rate than Big 5 term deposits for 33% taxpayers despite the notice period.

investments.risk_note: Registered NZ bank. Highest notice saver rate available as of March 2026. 32-day notice. Depositor Compensation Scheme applies.
investments.tax_treatment: Taxed at marginal rate (not PIE). RWT withheld at source.

loans.eligibility: NZ citizen or permanent resident. Regular income required. Credit check applies.
NZ citizen or permanent resident. Employed or regular income.
NZ citizen or permanent resident. Regular income required.
18+ NZ resident. Employed with regular income.
NZ citizen or permanent resident. Regular income. No establishment fee.
Specialises in non-standard borrowers. Self-employed and irregular income considered. Wider credit criteria than banks.
NZ residents 18+. Online application. Good credit can access rates from 9.99%. Self-employed accepted.

key_features: Level or stepped premiums — level costs more initially but doesn't increase with age
Terminal illness benefit: pays out if life expectancy under 12 months
Waiver of premium if totally disabled
Flexible cover amounts from $50,000 upward
insurance.eligibility: NZ residents up to age 70 at entry. Medical underwriting required.
insurance.note: Indicative $25/month is for a healthy 30-year-old non-smoker with $500,000 cover. Must apply via financial adviser.

key_features: AIA Vitality wellness programme — earn premium discounts for healthy behaviour
Terminal illness advance payment
Guaranteed insurability — increase cover at life events without new medicals
NZ's largest life insurer by market share
insurance.eligibility: NZ residents. Medical underwriting required. Must be arranged through a financial adviser.
insurance.note: Must use a financial adviser to purchase — not available direct to consumers.

key_features: Pays monthly benefit if unable to work due to illness or injury
Benefit period options: 2 years, 5 years, or to age 65
Waiting period options: 4, 8, 13, 26, or 52 weeks (shorter = more expensive)
Premiums are tax-deductible if your income is taxable
insurance.eligibility: NZ residents in paid employment or self-employed. Must be arranged through a financial adviser.
insurance.note: Self-employed people benefit most — no employer sick pay. Indicative $65/month for 30-year-old, 4-week wait, 2-year benefit.

key_features: Lump sum on diagnosis — no restrictions on how you spend it
Covers 50+ trauma events: cancer, heart attack, stroke, major organ failure
Partial benefits for less severe conditions
Can be standalone or bundled with life cover for discount
insurance.eligibility: NZ residents. Medical underwriting required. Available via financial advisers.
insurance.note: Cancer is the most common claim. Partners Life known for broad condition definitions.

insurance.coverage_typical: Private specialist, surgical, and hospital cover
key_features: NZ's largest health insurer — not-for-profit co-operative
Covers private specialist consultations, diagnostics, and surgery
Surgical cover up to $300,000 per year
Optional extras: GP visits, dental, optical
Workplace group discounts often available
insurance.eligibility: NZ residents. Medical underwriting — pre-existing conditions may be excluded.
insurance.note: Indicative $120/month for 30-year-old with standard excess. Higher excess = significantly lower premium. Get quote at southerncross.co.nz.

investments.risk_note: Government-owned bank. Sovereign backing. Largest bank in India by assets. DICGC insured up to Rs 5 lakh per depositor per bank.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at your income slab rate. TDS deducted at 10% if total interest exceeds Rs 40,000/year (Rs 50,000 for seniors). TDS drag reduces effective compounding — compare with T-Bills and liquid funds for 30%+ bracket.
investments.early_withdrawal: Premature withdrawal allowed with 0.5%-1% reduction in applicable rate.

investments.risk_note: Government-owned bank. Sovereign backing. DICGC insured up to Rs 5 lakh.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at slab rate. TDS at 10% above threshold. Annual TDS drag on multi-year deposits reduces effective yield.

investments.risk_note: Largest private sector bank in India. RBI regulated. DICGC insured up to Rs 5 lakh.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at slab rate. TDS at 10% if annual interest exceeds Rs 40,000 (Rs 50,000 for seniors).
investments.early_withdrawal: Premature withdrawal allowed with 1% penalty on applicable rate.

investments.risk_note: Largest private sector bank in India. RBI regulated. DICGC insured up to Rs 5 lakh.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at slab rate. TDS at 10% above threshold.

investments.risk_note: Second largest private bank in India. RBI regulated. DICGC insured up to Rs 5 lakh.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at slab rate. TDS at 10% above threshold.

investments.risk_note: Scheduled commercial bank. RBI regulated. DICGC insured up to Rs 5 lakh. Smaller than SBI/HDFC/ICICI.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at slab rate. TDS at 10% above threshold.

investments.provider: Post Office / Authorised Banks (SBI, HDFC, ICICI etc.)
investments.risk_note: Government of India guarantee — highest possible safety. Sovereign risk only. Not subject to bank failure. Best available rate in India for eligible investors.
investments.tax_treatment: Interest taxable at your slab rate. TDS if annual interest exceeds Rs 1 lakh (higher threshold than FDs). Section 80C deduction available on investment under old tax regime.
investments.early_withdrawal: 1.5% penalty if withdrawn before 2 years. 1% penalty between 2-5 years. Extension allowed for 3 more years after maturity.
investments.eligibility_note: Only for individuals aged 60 and above. Age 55+ for VRS retirees and retired defence personnel.

investments.provider: Post Office / Authorised Banks (SBI, HDFC, ICICI etc.)
investments.risk_note: Government of India guarantee. EEE (Exempt-Exempt-Exempt) tax status — the most tax-efficient instrument in India. 15-year lock-in with partial withdrawal from Year 7. Max Rs 1.5 lakh per year.
investments.tax_treatment: Triple tax-free: contributions deductible under Section 80C (old regime up to Rs 1.5L), interest fully tax-free every year, maturity fully tax-free. For a 30% slab taxpayer: effective post-tax yield is approximately 10.1% — far better than any FD after tax.
investments.early_withdrawal: Partial withdrawal (up to 50% of balance) allowed from Year 7 onward. Loan facility from Year 3. Full premature closure only in exceptional circumstances.

investments.risk_note: Government of India guarantee. No maximum investment limit — suitable for large lump sums. 5-year fixed term.
investments.tax_treatment: Investment qualifies for 80C deduction (old regime). Interest deemed reinvested annually also qualifies for 80C deduction. At maturity, total interest is taxable at slab. Effective post-tax return is attractive for 20% and below slab taxpayers.
investments.early_withdrawal: Not allowed except death of holder or court order.

investments.risk_note: Sovereign guarantee — Government of India. Zero credit risk. Tradeable on secondary market via SEBI-registered brokers (Zerodha, Groww, HDFC Securities etc.).
investments.tax_treatment: Discount gain taxed as Short Term Capital Gain (STCG) at slab rate. Critically: NO TDS deducted — your full principal compounds uninterrupted. Tax paid only at annual IT filing. For a 30% slab investor this advantage over quarterly TDS on FDs is worth approximately 0.3-0.5% additional effective yield.
investments.early_withdrawal: Tradeable on secondary market through SEBI-registered brokers.

investments.risk_note: Sovereign guarantee — Government of India. Zero credit risk. Tradeable on secondary market.
investments.tax_treatment: Discount gain taxed as STCG at slab rate. NO TDS. Full compounding without tax drag until annual filing. For investors in 30%+ bracket this beats bank FDs at equivalent headline rates.
investments.early_withdrawal: Tradeable on secondary market via registered brokers.

investments.provider: SBI MF / HDFC MF / ICICI Prudential MF (any major AMC)
investments.risk_note: SEBI regulated. Invests only in instruments maturing within 91 days — minimal credit and interest rate risk. NAV fluctuates very slightly. Not DICGC insured. Historical 1-year returns around 7-7.3%.
investments.tax_treatment: All gains taxed at your slab rate. NO TDS for resident investors. Tax is deferred until you redeem — your entire corpus compounds without any annual deduction. For 30%+ bracket investors this compounding advantage vs. quarterly TDS on FDs grows significantly over 2+ years.
investments.early_withdrawal: T+1 working day redemption. No exit load after 7 days from investment.

investments.provider: SBI MF / HDFC MF / ICICI Prudential MF (any major AMC)
investments.risk_note: Lowest risk among mutual funds. Invests only in overnight instruments. Near-zero credit risk. Suitable for parking funds for days or weeks.
investments.tax_treatment: All gains at slab rate. NO TDS. Tax deferred until redemption.
investments.early_withdrawal: Next working day (T+1) redemption. No exit load ever.

fees.processing: 1% of loan amount + GST (min Rs 1,000, max Rs 15,000)

loans.eligibility: Salaried or self-employed. Net monthly income minimum Rs 15,000. Credit score 700+. Age 21-60.
Salaried employees only. Minimum net monthly income Rs 25,000. Age 21-60. Good credit score required.
Salaried or self-employed. Min income Rs 30,000/month. Age 23-58.

fees.prepayment: Allowed after 1 EMI, up to 4% charge

loans.eligibility: Salaried or self-employed. Wide eligibility criteria. Fastest disbursal — often same day for salaried.

key_features: Pure term plan — death benefit only, no maturity value (lower premiums than endowment plans)
Online purchase only at licindia.in — no agent required
Government-backed: LIC claim settlement ratio ~99% (highest in India)
Level cover or increasing cover option
Return of premium option available at higher cost
insurance.eligibility: Age 18-65. Minimum sum assured Rs 50 lakh. Non-smoker rates significantly lower.
insurance.note: Rs 8,500/year is indicative for a 30-year-old non-smoker, Rs 1 Crore sum assured, 30-year term. Smokers pay 50-100% more. Calculate exact premium at licindia.in.

key_features: Online term plan — buy directly without agent
Life stage benefit: increase cover at marriage, childbirth without new medicals
Waiver of future premiums on critical illness diagnosis
Option to add critical illness or income benefit rider
HDFC Life claim settlement ratio: 99.5%
insurance.eligibility: Age 18-65. Minimum sum assured Rs 50 lakh.
insurance.note: Rs 9,200/year is indicative for 30-year-old non-smoker, Rs 1 Crore, 30-year term. Premium calculator at hdfclife.com.

key_features: Cashless hospitalisation at 14,000+ network hospitals across India
Pre-hospitalisation expenses covered 60 days before admission
Post-hospitalisation expenses covered 90 days after discharge
Day care procedures covered
No-claim bonus: sum insured increases 5% per claim-free year up to 50%
Section 80D tax deduction on premiums (up to Rs 25,000; Rs 50,000 for seniors)
insurance.note: India's largest standalone health insurer. Get quote at starhealth.in.

key_features: Cashless at 10,000+ hospitals
Unlimited restoration of sum insured during policy year
No room rent capping
Pre and post hospitalisation covered
80D tax deduction on premiums
Direct claim settlement — no TPA middleman
insurance.eligibility: Age 18-65 at entry. Lifelong renewal. Pre-existing conditions covered after 3-4 year waiting period.
insurance.note: Known for fast claim settlement. Get quote at nivabupa.com.
